evidence: Advancing Agility Automation Initiative…to leverage new technology and business models to further simplify and automate processes, and generate long-term savings

compliance with new and evolving laws, regulations or industry standards relating to AI may require significant investment and resources
our business may be adversely affected if we cannot successfully integrate AI into our business in a timely, cost-effective, and compliant manner

leverage new technology and business models to further simplify and automate processes

capex_mentions.quote: total pre-tax costs of $200,000 to $250,000 from inception through 2026
capex_mentions.context: AAA Initiative estimated total costs including program office, third-party, and implementation costs; automation/technology focus but not exclusively AI

limitations: The AAA Initiative cost figures ($200M-$250M) cover a broad productivity program including supply chain and SG&A optimization, not exclusively AI investment; score 3 reflects named initiative without AI-specific quantification.
AI narrative is largely aspirational and risk-framed; no named AI systems, vendors, or deployed use cases are described, limiting concreteness score.

Risk section is present and does name AI-specific risk categories (competitive disadvantage, regulatory compliance, cybersecurity amplification), supporting score 3, but stops short of quantified risk scenarios or named governance bodies.
The ticker echoed in the source is NSY per the input; the company is The Hershey Company (HSY) — pipeline should verify ticker field.
